data.body:
[5/12 Scheduled Maintenance Notice]

Sensei, there is a scheduled maintenance on 5/12 (Tue).

🗓️Maintenance Period: 5/12 (Tue) 2:00 – 5:00 AM (UTC)
➡️Details: https://t.co/TlL0QXC6d4

※ Maintenance hours are subject to change.
